# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/envoy_access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      protocol: TCP
      address: 127.0.0.1
      port_value: 9901

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@@': 
            cluster: service1
            stats_prefix: 'http'
            codec_type: AUTO
            idle_timeout: 15s
            route_config:
              name: local_route
              virtual_hosts:
              - name: backend
                domains:
                - '*'
                routes:
                - match:
                    prefix: '/users'
                  route:
                    cluster: service2
                    timeout: 30s
                - route:
                    cluster: default
      - name: envoy.router

clusters:
  - name: service1
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    hosts:
    - socket_address:
        address: 'service2.example.com'
        port_value: 80
  - name: default
    connect_timeout: 10s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    hosts:
    - socket_address:
        address: 'example.com'
        port_value: 80

http_filters:
- name: envoy.http_connection_manager
